actions.expression:
SELECT cght.hthm,
       cght.wxht,
       cght.htrq,
       cght.sccj1id,
       cght.sccj1,
       cght.kh_id,
       cght.khmc,
       cght.ywry,
       cght.cgry,
       cght.cgbm,
       cght.gdry,
       cght.gdbm,
       cght.yhry,
       cght.yhdd,
       cght.wxbm
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.hthm=[验货费用登记.合同号码]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 计算-费用合计
actions.caption: 计算-费用合计
actions.expression: [验货费用登记.交通合计]+[验货费用登记.住宿合计]+[验货费用登记.其他合计]

caption: 验货费用登记

view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%"+ "验货"  +"%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT   cght.hthm
FROM cght  where (cght.xjht="新") and ((cght.cgsh="1") or (cght.sfhz="通过")) order by SID desc
limit 0,1000

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.zdmc="批准人员")
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="验货费用登记")

name: 验货费用登记
title_field: 验货费用登记.合同号码
